instruction: Building a tree step by step (step 2 of 6). So far you've drawn: ground. Add the next part: rect (x=56, y=72, width=16, height=40, fill #6a3819) with id "trunk".

  <line id="ground" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="8" y1="112" x2="120" y2="112" />

target_svg:
